summary: Iteration 28 — Full end-to-end regression on the refactored Moyasar 'intent-based' PCI-compliant checkout, with LIVE test keys. Backend pytest suite = 21/21 GREEN (config enabled, tip intent, subscribe intent, webhook 3 verification paths, tip credit, idempotency, subscription initial credit, rate limits, Sentry env). Frontend /wallet renders (83.6 SAR available, breakdown rows), /u/crm_tester tip flow opens the tip-modal → submit-tip fires POST /api/tips → moyasar-checkout modal opens; subscribe flow same. FOUND & FIXED critical bug: MoyasarCheckout.jsx was pointing to a non-existent CDN version (mpf/1.15.0/mpf.js — returns 403) causing 'تعذّر الاتصال بميسر' on every checkout. Corrected to 1.7.3/moyasar.{js,css} — payment form now renders (name-on-card, card number, MM/YY, CVC, pay button).

minor.issue: Whitelist validator still uses AND: `payload.amount_sar not in ALLOWED_TIP_AMOUNTS and payload.amount_sar < 5`. Any value ≥5 is accepted regardless of whitelist. Carry-over from iteration 27 — non-blocker but should be OR.

MOYASAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET='Omarr187@&' is set, but the older backend.err.log still shows 'MOYASAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set — accepting webhook without verification' from a previous restart. After the last reload verification is enforced correctly (missing/wrong secret → 401 as tests confirmed).

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED IN THIS ITERATION — was hard-coded to CDN path 'https://cdn.moyasar.com/mpf/1.15.0/mpf.js' + '.../mpf.css' which return HTTP 403 (version does not exist). Any user hitting the tip/subscribe checkout saw the Arabic 'تعذّر الاتصال بميسر — تحقّق من الإنترنت' error and could NOT pay. Corrected to '/mpf/1.7.3/moyasar.js' + 'moyasar.css' (verified 200 OK, and window.Moyasar.init renders the card form).

action_items: Confirm the CDN URL 1.7.3 is acceptable, or pin to whichever Moyasar-blessed version you prefer (1.15.0 is not published). Also verify Apple Pay + STC Pay methods with the newer JS — this test only exercised the creditcard path since methods=[payload.method] in the intent means the modal only shows the selected method. If you want to always show all 3, change intent.methods to intent.methods that were negotiated with the user pre-checkout or just pass all 3.
(Carry-over) Fix tip amount validator in engines/moyasar_engine.py:94 — change 'and' to 'or' or remove ALLOWED_TIP_AMOUNTS.
Consider setting `MOYASAR_STRICT=1` env flag so backend refuses to boot when WEBHOOK_SECRET is unset in prod (currently the code accepts unsigned webhooks silently in that case, which is dangerous).
critical_code_review_comments: MoyasarCheckout.jsx: passing prop `publishable_api_key` — both `api_key` and `publishable_api_key` appear inside moyasar.js v1.7.3 source, and the form did render, but the docs canonically use `publishable_api_key` for CoT-style hosted forms; confirm no console warnings in the wild.

Backend intent.methods = [payload.method] means the Moyasar form only offers the single method the user pre-selected. This is intentional but note that Apple Pay UX inside Moyasar.js requires domain association files; verify with Moyasar dashboard.
moyasar_engine.subscribe_to_creator: pending subscription doc is now correctly inserted BEFORE any external call (iteration 27 minor issue is resolved because there is no external call anymore).
server.py Sentry init is conditional on SENTRY_DSN — good. No sensitive PII sent by default.

success_rate.frontend: 100% after CDN fix — /wallet renders, /u/crm_tester tip-profile-btn opens tip-modal (6 amounts + custom + 3 methods + submit-tip), clicking submit-tip → POST /api/tips 200 → moyasar-checkout modal opens with correct amount + description, Moyasar.js v1.7.3 attaches to moyasar-form (3 child nodes, name/card/mm-yy/cvc/pay-button visible). Subscribe flow identical (49 SAR).

test_credentials: super_admin: crm@test.com / testpass123 (username=crm_tester); test users TEST_it28_*, TEST_uifan* created during testing
seed_data_creation: Reset/ensured crm_tester plan (49 SAR, 'اشتراك مميز', 2 perks). Created several TEST_it28_ and TEST_uifan_ users. Fired paid tip + subscription_initial webhooks against crm_tester to lift breakdown.tips_sar and subscriptions_sar. crm_tester wallet now shows 83.6 SAR available (292.5 tips gross + 44.1 subs − 253 reserved for pending payouts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The frontend MoyasarCheckout.jsx CDN pin is now 1.7.3. If Moyasar releases 1.7.4+ and the current one 403s, bump to the new version. window.Moyasar.init is called with `publishable_api_key` — v1.7.3 accepts both this and `api_key`. Real Moyasar test keys are live: pk_test_zEefm..., sk_test_4SDT... — do NOT complete a real 3-D-Secure card transaction from automated tests (test cards can leave dangling PaymentIntents). Webhook secret is literally 'Omarr187@&' — test asserts hmac.compare_digest works with all three verification methods.
rca of the issue: MoyasarCheckout.jsx was hard-coded to a Moyasar CDN version that does not exist ('mpf/1.15.0/mpf.js' & '.../mpf.css' → CloudFront 403). The main agent likely typo'd or hallucinated the version. Reproduction: any user clicking submit-tip or subscribe-btn saw the Arabic error 'تعذّر الاتصال بميسر — تحقّق من الإنترنت' — the loadMoyasarJs() promise rejected because script.onerror fired on the 403 response. Mitigation: changed both constants to '1.7.3/moyasar.js' and '1.7.3/moyasar.css' (verified 200 OK via curl). After fix, window.Moyasar becomes defined, Moyasar.init injects the card form into [data-testid=moyasar-form] (3 child nodes), and the pay button reads '25 ريال سعودي' as expected.
